originalTitle: Sudan drone attack on key hospital killed 64 people during Eid, WHO says
title: Sudan drone attack on key hospital killed 64 people during Eid, WHO says
content: The strike killed 64 people, including 13 children, two nurses and a doctor, according to the WHO head.

title: Rwanda batter becomes youngest women's T20 centurion
content: Rwanda's Fanny Utagushimaninde says it was like "a dream" after becoming the youngest woman to make a T20 international century at the age of 15 years and 223 days.

title: Newcastle-Sunderland halted after discrimination reports

originalTitle: Six touches in the box, six goals - the epitome of clinical?
title: Six touches in the box, six goals - the epitome of clinical?
content: Is QPR's 6-1 rout of Portsmouth - in which they only had six touches in the opposition's penalty area - the most clinical performance ever?
